rules.rule: Only files under 01_LOAD_TO_PLATFORM_PROGRAMME_DATA may be used as programme payloads.
Files under DO_NOT_UPLOAD_AS_PROGRAMME_DATA folders must never be created as programme records.
Each payload row must have its register ID populated.
Do not overwrite protected existing platform fields without approval: owner, status, start_date, end_date, slipping_indicator.
Rows marked REVIEW_UPDATE_CANDIDATE or REVIEW_REQUIRED in the control map require review before update.
Programme descriptions must remain programme data only and must not include prompt, runbook, instruction, or control-map text.
